foundational_triad.base: unity + multiplicity. Irreducible third modality = context = Koestler's holon = Sartre's third-party. Geometry: vortical. Structure: holarchy. Field: unific. Only unificities are actual; pure unity/multiplicity are virtual
modality of THINGS. Every unity is a multiplicity of at least two. Geometry: lateral. Structure: holism. Field: unitive (vision/representation)
modality of SETS OF THINGS. Every multiplicity is a unity of at least one. Geometry: vertical. Structure: hierarchy. Field: multiplicative (ordering)

foundational_triad._meta: generative triad from which TAPS, RIP, and Dialectic unfold. Config space = 1, each modality is a 1-prime (different mode of being-one)

dialectic.base: context window / before-after frame / enables synchronicity of the other three

T.base: specific vector of involution / densification / enfolding
causal character of directional pairs: evo/invo=timelike, expansion/condension=spacelike, rarefaction/condensation=lightlike

A.collision: != clinical depression (though structural parallel may exist)

A._meta: how-I-am / being-axis / athesis. Dipoles: anopression (upward/outward, decreasing difficulty) and anapression (downward/inward, increasing difficulty). Chain: anopression <- expression <- impression <- adpression <-> compression -> depression -> suppression -> oppression -> anapression. Alpha = anapressive phase constant (L12). Sigma = anopressive phase constant (L21). See §5.45

P.base: praxis as active intentional dwelling (protonomic register)

P._meta: how-I-act / action-axis / praxis proper. Definition: the process of projection & reflection in consumptive consummation. Praxis always conserved (via consummation in laminar flow, §5.38). Practico-inert = gas/fuel (sedimented past praxis). Praxistatic = engine (active interface). REVERSED from §5.24, see §5.43

S.base: convergence toward shared hexitive ground (group level)

S._meta: how-I-create / creation-axis / synthesis at TAPS level. Syntegration always consumed (via consumption in turbulent flow, §5.38). Law: minimal praxis for maximal syntegration = variational principle = principle of least action (§5.50)

RIP._meta: direction through TAPS space / flow function. TAP=rate, TAPS=position, RIP=direction. 8 configs (2^3) x 6 orderings (3!) = 48 states. R^(I^P) != (R^I)^P. Death = mode-lock (flip freq -> 0). Falsification: Stage 3X-RIP with F1-F8 (§5.30)

cross_source.maps_to: continuous TAP (ODE) captures richer motif structure than discrete metathetic step — different-length walk pairs vs same-length only

cross_source.maps_to: L-matrix four-channel structure. Content (pragmatic) ↔ P+S fields (L12+L21). Expression (semiotic) ↔ T+A fields (L11+L22). Territory ↔ TAPS signature stability. D ↔ cross-metathesis transforming signature. Fourth independent convergence on 4-channel alongside R&B, Emery, Lizier

content/expression as orthogonal axis WITHIN each L-channel — every L12 event has both content (what action) and expression (what sign). NOT same as L-matrix split. Candidate 4×2=8-fold classification
cross_source.suggest: missing dimension? content/expression character not currently captured in L-matrix ledger

cross_source.maps_to: paradigm shifts, apocalypse mechanisms (§5.26), demetathesis cascades — agents carried from established TAPS trajectory. Creative (beneficial) or destructive (detrimental)
hexis-praxis cycle grounded as mutual immanence (not simple alternation) — each issues from the other. Molar/molecular are not opposed but co-constitutive
cross_source.suggest: §5.19 should be reframed from temporal cycle to ontological co-implication

cross_source.maps_to: conservation law §5.43: what is retained = what increases connections at each level = minimal praxis for maximal syntegration. Variational principle from continental philosophy — independent convergence with Fermat/Feynman

four system trajectory states: (1) negative D = overconservation/rigidity (high L11, low L12), (2) relative positive D = innovation captured by structure (L12 active but segmented by L22), (3) absolute creative D = paradigm shift (all four L-channels reconfigure), (4) absolute destructive D = catastrophic collapse (demetathesis without recovery)
cross_source.suggest: expand binary beneficial/detrimental to four forms; two 'relative' forms describe sub-apocalyptic dynamics currently undifferentiated

cross_source.maps_to: apocalypse mechanisms: too-sudden destratification = suicidal or cancerous. 'Concrete rules of extreme caution' = graduated demetathesis (§5.27). System destabilization must be controlled
cross_source.suggest: formal rate threshold for 'too-sudden' destratification?

cross_source.maps_to: global/nonlocal field (L11+L22, rhizomatic) = smooth space: vortical, nomadic, absolute D. Assembly field (L12+L21, topology-respecting) = striated space: measured, segmented, relative D. Note: 'field' is project extension — D&G speak of spaces not fields

TAPS signature as concrete machine: trajectory-specific, singular, dated, immanent. Phylum = dM_history (matter-movement). Diagram = L-matrix distribution (nonformal functions). Not a classification label but a consolidated aggregate
cross_source.suggest: are phylum (trajectory) and diagram (distribution) tracked as genuinely distinct in current implementation?

cross_source.maps_to: conjunction = blocking/gating/closure (axiomatics, L22 regulatory check). Connection = creative multiplication (junction producing novel types). Connection fallacy = confusing conjunction with connection
schizoanalysis as quantitative: assemblages have measurable coefficients relative to abstract machines. Legitimates sigma-TAP's computational approach — D&G's own prescription

consistency = cross-metathesis engine (novel connections). Stratification = TAPS classification (organizing into types). Axiomatic/overcoding = L22 environmental regulation (totalizations). All three 'overlap and intertwine'
cross_source.suggest: novel mapping — needs testing. Do simulation assemblages exhibit all three simultaneously?

cross_source.maps_to: three failure modes: (1) molar danger = overconservation/homogeneity/rigidity, (2) molecular danger = micro-black holes/local collapse/hexitive overaccumulation (§5.65), (3) flight danger = catastrophic dissolution/demetathesis without syntegration
cross_source.suggest: three-mode failure taxonomy vs simpler binary beneficial/detrimental

_meta.description: Inter-source linkages: tetradic structure mirroring metathetic dialectics. Thesis/athesis = two source concepts. Synthesis = what RELATES them (common ground, involutory). Metathesis = what EACH does independently (separate real-world functions, evolutory).

entries.synthesis: [independent_convergence] Stored past as identity mechanism — neither tradition cites the other; info-theoretic expansion and dialectical analysis arrive at the same structural principle independently
entries.metathesis: A(Xi) measures past-predictability via loop motifs in network topology (comp. neuroscience). Practico-inert stores sedimented praxis as potential energy (critical theory). Each operates in its own domain — one computable, one phenomenological — yet both ground §5.24/§5.43

entries.synthesis: [independent_convergence] Bidirectional interaction as necessary condition for persistent structure
entries.metathesis: Loops are the only motifs that build A(Xi) > 0; unidirectional paths contribute nothing (info theory). Reciprocity gauge measures transaction health; non-reciprocal exchanges degrade the system (org theory). Both ground conservation law §5.43

entries.synthesis: [independent_convergence] Mutual change as the threshold for structural contribution
entries.metathesis: Unidirectional information transfer builds zero storage in network dynamics. Interaction without mutual change is not a transaction in sociotechnical systems. Each defines a minimum bar for 'real' exchange in its own domain

entries.synthesis: [complementarity] Self-constancy — the agent remaining recognizably itself across time
entries.metathesis: A(Xi) quantifies self-predictability from network structure (computable, graph-theoretic). Ipseity is the phenomenological structure of selfhood as irreducible trajectory (lived, first-person). TAPS signature persistence is where they meet

entries.synthesis: [complementarity] Temporal deferral — information/experience arriving at different times from a single event
entries.metathesis: Feedforward loops create temporal echoes: same perturbation arrives via different-length paths (network dynamics). Time as deferral of consummation: the agent persists by not completing (phenomenology). §5.25 differential time dilation

entries.synthesis: [complementarity] Local cohesion + global coordination as dual requirement
entries.metathesis: Modularity enhances sync within modules but decreases it across the network — mathematical consequence of motif structure (network dynamics). DP2 defines self-managing groups with purposeful inter-group linking as organizational design principle (sociotechnical theory). Family group architecture §5.4

entries.synthesis: [independent_convergence] External pressure strengthening internal cohesion
entries.metathesis: Clustered topology increases local synchronizability via closed walk motifs (network science). Asabiyya = group solidarity forged at the frontier under shared threat (cliodynamics). tau_group + L22 pressure

entries.synthesis: [complementarity] Upper bound on dense reciprocal structure
entries.metathesis: Clustering coefficient measures local loop density as computable storage proxy (graph theory). Dunbar number ~150 = maximum group size sustaining full reciprocity (cognitive anthropology). Junction capacity = where clustering can no longer be maintained via direct links

entries.synthesis: [independent_convergence] Trade-off between local identity and global coordination
entries.metathesis: Storage-sync complementarity: more local storage = less global synchronizability (information theory). Multilevel selection: groups minimizing internal conflict outcompete (historical dynamics). Youn ratio (0.60) calibrates this balance

entries.synthesis: [genealogy] Documented intellectual lineage — Emery explicitly builds on R&B + Pepper's contextualism
entries.metathesis: R&B (1951): four communication levels (within-self, self-other, other-self, cultural field) in group dynamics (psychology). Emery-Trist (1965): causal textures + design principles for sociotechnical systems (org theory). L-matrix genealogy: R&B -> Emery -> sigma-TAP

entries.synthesis: [independent_convergence] Four-fold structure for describing system dynamics
entries.metathesis: R&B: four communication channels in group process (psychology). D&G: tetravalent assemblage with four D-forms — deterritorialization, reterritorialization, decoding, overcoding (philosophy). Fourth independent tetra-mapping alongside Emery + Lizier

entries.synthesis: [complementarity] Shared context as constitutive force
entries.metathesis: Level IV = cultural/contextual communication enveloping and conditioning all other levels (communication theory). Asabiyya = group solidarity forged by shared frontier experience under external pressure (cliodynamics). L22 / tau_context

entries.synthesis: [tension] Engagement with otherness — but they DISAGREE about its character
entries.metathesis: Totalization: incorporating otherness into self-project, the dialectical engine of history (Sartre, critical theory). Enjoyment: living FROM the other without totalizing, nourishment that preserves alterity (Levinas, phenomenology). Cross-metathesis must preserve both modes

entries.synthesis: [complementarity] Bidirectional fold — outward and inward as complementary movements
entries.metathesis: Consummation (praxis->process) and consumption (process->praxis): dialectical cycle of action becoming structure and structure becoming action (Sartre, social philosophy). Explication (unfold) and implication (enfold): physical order-unfolding cycle (Bohm, quantum ontology). T-axis in TAPS

entries.synthesis: [complementarity] Self-undermining success — system generating its own destabilizers
entries.metathesis: Counter-finality: practico-inert redirecting praxis against its original intention (Sartre, dialectical reason). Elite overproduction: social mobility system producing more elites than positions, creating revolutionary pressure (Turchin, cliodynamics). §5.65 demetathesis cascade

entries.synthesis: [independent_convergence] Systemic self-defeat as fundamental failure mode
entries.metathesis: Laissez-faire: absence of design principle -> pathological drift, system degrades via neglect (Emery, organizational ecology). Counter-finality: practico-inert actively redirects praxis against itself (Sartre, dialectical reason). Shadow organization (w:95) is the organizational form

entries.synthesis: [complementarity] Optimization under constraint — minimal expenditure for maximal effect
entries.metathesis: Least action: light/particles follow the path minimizing action integral (physics, variational calculus). Multilevel selection: groups minimizing internal conflict outcompete in inter-group competition (cliodynamics). Conservation law §5.43

entries.synthesis: [complementarity] Efficiency = investing only in what builds structure
entries.metathesis: Least action: nature selects the extremal path among all possible paths (physics). Loop requirement: only closed-walk motifs contribute to A(Xi); non-loop paths build zero storage (information theory). Conservation law's info-theoretic formalization

entries.synthesis: [independent_convergence] Minimal viability conditions for a persisting agent — neither tradition cites the other
entries.metathesis: Six criteria: elbow room, learning, mutual support, meaningfulness etc. as design requirements for sustainable work (organizational psychology). Enjoyment/dwelling/nourishment as phenomenological conditions of interiority (continental philosophy). §5.66 viability diagnostic

entries.synthesis: [complementarity] Observable surface vs underlying capacity
entries.metathesis: Facade = type_set surface presenting itself to the world; face exceeds facade via practico-inert potential (phenomenology). Skills matrix = proficiency grid (0/x/xx) mapping observable competency (organizational design). §5.58 artifact vs actor distinction

entries.synthesis: [complementarity] Two registers (continuous flow vs discrete event) capturing different aspects of the same dynamics
entries.metathesis: Continuous-time dynamics: different-length walk pairs contribute via binomial weighting, richer motif structure (network dynamics). Consummation/consumption: praxis->process and process->praxis as dialectical cycle (social philosophy). Two sigma-TAP layers are structurally non-redundant

entries.synthesis: [complementarity] Multi-rate temporal structure as constitutive of identity
entries.metathesis: Coupling delays: different channels contribute to synchronizability at different timescales; forthcoming Lizier-Atay-Jost paper (network dynamics). Time as praxitive deferral: agent persists by not completing, consummation deferred = life continuing (phenomenology). Four time-modes at different rates §5.25

entries.synthesis: [independent_convergence] Four-channel system structure arrived at independently — D&G from continental philosophy (assemblage theory), Emery-Trist from organizational systems theory (causal textures). Neither tradition derives from the other on this specific structural point
entries.metathesis: Tetravalent assemblage: content/expression × territory/deterritorialization as irreducible fourfold analysis of any assemblage (philosophy). Causal textures: L11/L12/L21/L22 as four environmental transaction types between system and environment (org theory). L-matrix genealogy runs R&B → Emery, but D&G arrive independently

entries.synthesis: [independent_convergence] Variational principle — what is retained is only what optimizes a global criterion. Continental philosophy and physics arrive at the same structural insight from maximally different starting points
entries.metathesis: Selection rule: only what increases the number of connections at each level of division/composition is retained on the plane of consistency (philosophy). Least action: nature selects the path minimizing the action integral among all possible paths (physics). Conservation law §5.43 is their common project mapping

entries.synthesis: [independent_convergence] Only structure-building paths contribute — what doesn't increase connections/storage is not retained
entries.metathesis: Selection rule: plane of consistency retains only what increases connections (philosophy). Loop requirement: only closed-walk motifs (feedback/feedforward) contribute to A(Xi); unidirectional paths build zero storage (information theory). One formulated qualitatively, the other computably — both arrive at the same exclusion principle

entries.synthesis: [complementarity] Bidirectional co-constitution — not alternation between opposed states but each issuing from within the other
entries.metathesis: Mutual immanence: molar/molecular are not opposed but co-constitutive — arborification of rhizomes AND rhizomatic escape from trees (D&G, ontology). Praxis-process/process-praxis: action becomes structure (consummation) and structure becomes action (consumption) as dialectical cycle (Sartre, social philosophy). Hexis-praxis cycle §5.19 is grounded by both

entries.synthesis: [independent_convergence] The distinction between real exchange (which builds structure) and apparent exchange (which merely circulates) — both traditions independently define a threshold separating genuine from spurious encounter
entries.metathesis: Conjunction = blocking/gating/closure vs connection = creative multiplication (D&G, philosophy). Interaction without mutual change is not a transaction (Emery, sociotechnical systems). Both ground the connection fallacy §5.61 and the conservation law's efficiency criterion

entries.synthesis: [complementarity] System trajectory taxonomy — both provide multi-state descriptions of how systems move through phases of stability, partial change, creative transformation, and catastrophic collapse
entries.metathesis: Four D-forms: negative (overconservation), relative positive (captured innovation), absolute creative (paradigm shift), absolute destructive (collapse) — qualitative ontology of system states (philosophy). Secular cycles: limit cycles in population/elite/state phase space with characteristic expansion-stagflation-crisis-depression sequence (cliodynamics). §5.67 L-channel phase space

entries.synthesis: [complementarity] Uncontrolled dissolution as system danger — both identify the absence of graduated structure-dissolution as a specific pathology, not just the absence of order
entries.metathesis: Destratification warning: too-sudden destratification = suicidal or cancerous; 'concrete rules of extreme caution' required (D&G, philosophy). Laissez-faire: absence of design principle → pathological drift, system degrades through non-design (Emery, org theory). Both warn that dissolution must be controlled — §5.27 graduated demetathesis

decisions_archive.what: Trust stability metric: CV-squared vs raw variance
decisions_archive.why: Scale-invariant; raw variance fails with dM 1-100 range

decisions_archive.what: Junction metric: symmetric vs asymmetric trust
decisions_archive.why: Asymmetric makes cross-metathesis eligibility depend on evaluation order

decisions_archive.what: Absorptive family creation: conditional vs unconditional
decisions_archive.chose: Unconditional (always create family on absorptive cross)
decisions_archive.why: Conditional guard silently skipped first-gen agents

validation_log.detail: All entries from design doc §4.2-4.8. Dialectic, T, A, P, S, RIP and cross_source.
All 7 phases were pure implementation. No new theoretical concepts.
RB:Level_I-IV cross_source entries. Preliminary — deep review pending.
Source: Unificity.md. Holarch: unificity=holarchy(vortical), unity=holism(lateral), multiplicity=hierarchy(vertical).
Living-from-metathesis, serialized beings, absorptive=metathematization, time=praxitive deferral, 4 fields, reception field, facade/face.
22 Sartre->sigma-TAP mappings. Key: immanence=anapression, transcendence=anopression, praxis-process=consummation.
Tetravalent assemblage=L-matrix, conjunction vs connection, 4 diagnostic meters. 4 D forms = 4 L-channels (3rd independent tetra-mapping).
Original L11/L12/L21/L22 confirmed. Type V vortical. Six criteria. Two-stage active adaptation. Three frozen maladaptive states.

validation_log.check: OST deep dive — 4 new sources, 16 Emery mappings
validation_log.detail: Distilled: opensystemstheory.org, Emery-M-2000, Emery-Emery-1974/2022, deGuerre-2016. Total distilled sources: 20.
Reciprocity gauge, CDF/Maxwell's demon, simulacrum scale, six criteria diagnostic. Added: transaction_biunimodal, reciprocity_gauge, directive_correlation_CDF, simulacrum_levels.

L-channel phase space + limit cycles. Trilaminar ring: ano/meso/ana. Inter-ring distance = directive correlation. Nested rings for groups. Added: secular_cycles, elite_overproduction, trilaminar_rings.
Turchin 2013, Turchin-Gavrilets 2009, Turchin JGH 2009. Ring-volution: top=evolution, bottom=involution, meso=transvolution. Total sources: 23.
Double helix with RNA-like meso. Syntegration/praxis ring mappings. Janus through-lines. Seven pressure vectors as cross-bridges. Alterity cascade.

4 concepts mapped (ActiveInfoStorage, ClusteringCoefficient, LoopRequirement, FeedforwardEchoes), 5 integration points. Re-distilled with v5 skill (cropped figures, interpretation file). Key novel finding: unidirectional interactions contribute nothing to identity storage.

5 concepts mapped (InfoStorageSyncTriangle, ModularityEffect, EigenvalueBlindness, CouplingDelays, ContinuousVsDiscrete), 5 integration points. Re-distilled with v5 skill (26 slides rendered, 12 visually decomposed, mandatory variable defs on all equations). Supplementary to main PNAS paper distillation.

15 concepts mapped, 13 new cross_source entries (w:125-137), 6 integration points, 4 open questions, 7 convergence web entries (cw:23-29). v5 re-distill: 17 key concepts, 1 figure (Computer Einstein halftone), continental/post-structuralist register. Fourth independent convergence on 4-channel structure. Selection rule = conservation law. User confirmed: rhizomatic ↔ smooth ↔ global field.

No concept_map changes. MEMORY.md trimmed to orientation card (228->41 lines). Added Step 0f (onhand first-run integration), Step 11 (handoff sync), promotion check (onhand Step 5). memory_config added to hot layer schema. All theoretical content confirmed present in warm concept_map and convergence_web.
